forecast_accuracy.note: Naive baseline = demand on the same weekday one week prior (SalesLag7), the fairest naive comparator given the strong weekly seasonality confirmed in EDA. Both scored on the identical holdout window (last 6 weeks, cutoff 2015-06-19).

assumptions.note: Inventory-to-sales ratio and overstock-reduction range are published FMCG/retail supply-chain industry benchmarks, not derived from the Rossmann dataset (which has no inventory/cost fields). The annual revenue run-rate they're applied to IS derived from actual model/data output.
